name: wedge_25deg
notes: Isosceles triangle with 25-deg apex angle (half-angle alpha=12.5 deg). Apex A=(0,10), base B=(-2.216947,0), C=(2.216947,0). h_b=10*tan(12.5)=2.21694663mm, b_side=10/cos(12.5)=10.24279514mm. Inradius r=H*sin(alpha)/(sin(alpha)+1)=1.77928778mm. Incenter I=(0,1.77928778). Raw medial axis: 3 branches: apex spine I->A (len=8.2207mm), left base I->B (len=2.8427mm), right base I->C (len=2.8427mm). EP.cpp trim: global max_w=2r=3.5586mm, threshold=4r=7.1172mm. Base branches: open endpoint at B/C (contour corners), len=2.8427 < 7.1172 -> REMOVED. Apex spine: open endpoint at A (contour corner), len=8.2207 >= 7.1172 -> SURVIVES. Reference axis: apex spine (0,r) to (0,10), 823 points at 0.01mm steps. Width formula: w(y)=2*h_b*(10-y)/b_side, w in [0.0,3.5586] mm.
